env.harness: HuggingFace forward path, greedy, batch=1, warmup + median of 3
env.note: Llama-2-70B. FULL wikitext-2 perplexity (not capped), seqlen 2048, decode_tokens=128. fp16 70B (~138 GB) does not fit on one 80 GB GPU and was not run.

results.name: fp16-70b
results.comment: does NOT fit on one 80 GB H100; needs 2+ GPUs
